name: hf-studio
description: The all-in-one orchestrator for Motion Studio — take a plain-language brief (or data, or an existing clip) and produce a finished, on-brand MP4 by walking the full 7-phase production chain (concept then script then storyboard then voiceover then build then validate then render). It runs each granular hf-* skill's scripts in order and reads their numbered artifacts; it does NOT re-implement them. Use this as the DEFAULT entry point for "make me a video / explainer / data video / social cut" requests, and for re-entry on a finished project (restyle, re-voice, re-render) on frozen upstream facts. Local and keyless — no HeyGen cloud, lambda, or auth.

inputs.name: brief
inputs.description: The video request — a plain-language brief/script/topic, a source URL, a data file (CSV/JSON), or an existing media clip path. This sets which JTBD front-end the chain starts with.

inputs.name: aspect-ratios
inputs.description: Any of 16:9, 9:16, 1:1 (space/comma separated). Default = the onboarding/context default, else 16:9.

inputs.name: voice
inputs.description: A Kokoro voice id (e.g. am_michael, af_nova) for the voiceover. Default = the context default voice.

inputs.name: music
inputs.description: on or off — whether to add a background music bed. Default = the context default, else off.

inputs.name: quality
inputs.description: draft | standard | high — the render quality. Default draft for previews; standard for the final deliverable.

inputs.name: name
inputs.description: Output file stem for the MP4s (exports/<name>-<ar>.mp4). Default = the project slug.

outputs.name: concept
outputs.description: The 6-dimension base concept (subject, composition, style, palette+hex, typography, mood) produced by hf-concept.

outputs.name: script
outputs.description: The beat-structured VO + on-screen text (provenance-faithful) produced by hf-script.

outputs.name: storyboard
outputs.description: Per-beat blocks / transitions / track layout + frame ranges produced by hf-storyboard.

outputs.name: timing
outputs.description: Word-level voiceover timestamps produced by hf-voiceover (alongside assets/vo/*.wav).

outputs.name: composition
outputs.description: The lint-clean HyperFrames project authored by hf-build (vendored GSAP + system fonts + scenes).

outputs.name: validation
outputs.description: The lint + snapshot pass/block report produced by hf-validate (plus key frames in snapshots/).

outputs.name: videos
outputs.description: One verified, on-brand H.264 MP4 per requested aspect ratio — the finished deliverable, rendered by hf-render.

outputs.name: summary
outputs.description: The run summary hf-studio writes — the resolved parameters (voice, style, palette, ARs), per-phase artifact paths, and any fallback taken.
